ci_support_linux_64_hdf51.14.6mpimpich.y:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
hdf5:
- 1.14.6
libnetcdf:
- 4.10.0
mpi:
- mpich
mpich:
- '5'
openmpi:
- '5'
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
zlib:
- '1'
name: netcdf-cxx4
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: netcdf-cxx4
  version: "4.3.1"
  build: 22
  # recipe-lint fails if mpi is undefined
  mpi: ${{ mpi or "nompi" }}
  # prioritize nompi via build number
  build_number: ${{ build + 100 if mpi == "nompi" else build }}
  # add build string so packages can depend on mpi or nompi variants explicitly:
  # `netcdf-cxx4 * mpi_mpich_*` for mpich
  # `netcdf-cxx4 * mpi_*` for any mpi
  # `netcdf-cxx4 * nompi_*` for no mpi
  mpi_prefix: ${{ "mpi_" + mpi if mpi != "nompi" else "nompi" }}

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-cxx4/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e3fe3d2ec06c1c2772555bf1208d220aab5fee186d04bd265219b0bc7a978edc
  patches:
    # 2021/12/05 hmaarrfk
    # Patches were taken by looking at the commit history since the last
    # release in 2019. The following 4 patches should be removed once
    # version 4.3.2 is released.
    # Patches were taken in order, up to the point where the usage of
    # CHECK_LIBRARY_EXISTS was fixed on linux.
    # For some reason, hdf5 had a hard time getting found on OSX, so
    # we decided to manually specify the location of HDF5.
    - patches/0001-remove_debug_flag.patch
    - patches/0002-specify_libadd.patch
    - patches/0003-install_netcdfcxxconfig_cmake.patch
    - patches/0004-fix_CHECK_LIBRARY_EXISTS.patch
    - patches/0005-normalize-eols-examples.patch
    - patches/0006-Use_HAVE_NC_SET_LOG_LEVEL.patch

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}
  string: ${{ mpi_prefix }}_h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler("c") }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
    - cmake
    - if: unix
      then:
        - gnuconfig
        - make
    - if: mpi == "openmpi" and build_platform != target_platform
      then: ${{ mpi }}
  host:
    # need to list hdf5 and libnetcdf twice to get version pinning from
    # conda_build_config and build pinning from ${{ mpi_prefix }}
    - hdf5
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - libnetcdf
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - zlib
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ mpi }}
  run:
    - hdf5 * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - libnetcdf * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ mpi }}
    - if: mpi == "openmpi"
      then: openssh
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage(name, upper_bound="x.x") }}
    - if: mpi != "nompi"
      then: ${{ name }} * ${{ mpi_prefix }}_*

tests:
  - script:
      - if: not win
        then:
          - ncxx4-config --all
          - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libnetcdf-cxx4${SHLIB_EXT}
          - test -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libnetcdf_c++4${SHLIB_EXT}
          # No static libs should be installed by default on conda-forge.
          - test ! -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libnetcdf-cxx4.a
          - test ! -f ${PREFIX}/lib/libnetcdf_c++4.a
        else:
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\lib\netcdf-cxx4.lib exit 1
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\lib\netcdf_c++4.lib exit 1
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\bin\netcdf-cxx4.dll exit 1
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\Library\bin\netcdf_c++4.dll exit 1

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-cxx4
  license: NetCDF
  license_file: COPYRIGHT
  summary: Unidata NetCDF C++ Library
  repository: https://github.com/Unidata/netcdf-cxx4

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - kmuehlbauer
    - ocefpaf
    - xylar
    - hmaarrfk
